# Robots.txt for OpenClaw / AgencyOS
# https://agencyos.network/robots.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Crawl delay for all bots
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block sensitive and non-public paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /_astro/
Disallow: /*?*
Disallow: /*.json$

# Google specific rules
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0.5

# Bing specific rules
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block image crawling for certain paths
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://agencyos.network/sitemap.xml
